description: tilize + untilize identity passthrough - implement reader, compute, writer kernels

approach: TensorAccessor for RM stick reads, prepare_reduce_scaler for scaler/eps, gamma/beta replication with 32 stick copies, main loop reads 32 sticks per tile-row pushing Wt pages
tilize cb_in->cb_tilized then untilize cb_tilized->cb_out, using helpers with compute_kernel_hw_startup(cb_in, cb_scaler, cb_out)
TensorAccessor with stick_size page, wait Wt pages cb_out, write 32 sticks per tile-row via noc_async_write_page

change: Changed absent gamma/beta TensorAccessorArgs placeholder from [0] to [0,0]
reason: Interleaved TensorAccessorArgs uses 2 CT args (args_config + aligned_page_size). Single [0] placeholder caused offset chain miscalculation for chained TensorAccessorArgs declarations in reader kernel

details: ttnn.open_device() requires keyword arg device_id=0, conftest passes positional int

description: conftest.py passes positional arg to ttnn.open_device(0) but API requires keyword arg device_id=0

reason: API requires keyword argument, positional int not accepted

details: strict-aliasing violation in reinterpret_cast for bf16->float conversion in reader kernel

description: reinterpret_cast for bf16->float conversion breaks strict-aliasing. Instead, pass raw float as uint32_t runtime arg using struct.pack on host side, and use union or bfloat16_to_float on device side

change: Added float_to_uint32_bits helper, replaced packed bf16 scaler/eps with raw float32 bit patterns as runtime args
reason: prepare_reduce_scaler takes float, avoid bf16 encoding/decoding complexity and strict-aliasing issues

approach: Replaced reinterpret_cast bf16->float with union-based uint32->float conversion for scaler/eps runtime args

change: Pass scaler/eps as raw float32 bits in runtime args, use union to decode in kernel

upstream_fixes: PD scaler/eps encoding changed to float32 bits

description: compute per-row mean and subtract from input (x - mean) - add reduce(mean) + sub(COL) phases to compute kernel

approach: Added reduce(SUM,REDUCE_ROW,WaitUpfrontNoPop) for mean, sub(COL,NoWaitPopAtEnd,WaitAndPopPerTile) for centering, untilize cb_centered instead of cb_tilized

cb_summary: cb_in(0):Wt/Wt cb_tilized(24):Wt/Wt(reduce WaitUpfrontNoPop+sub PopAtEnd) cb_scaler(8):persistent cb_mean(25):1/1 cb_centered(26):Wt/Wt cb_out(16):Wt/Wt

description: Full normalization: square + reduce(var) + add_eps_rsqrt + mul(inv_std) - 4 new phases in compute kernel

approach: Added 4 new phases: square(WaitUpfrontNoPop) cb_centered->cb_sq, reduce(SUM,REDUCE_ROW) cb_sq->cb_var, add(SCALAR,WaitAndPopPerTile,WaitUpfrontNoPop)+rsqrt post-op cb_var+cb_eps->cb_inv_std, mul(COL,NoWaitPopAtEnd,WaitAndPopPerTile) cb_centered*cb_inv_std->cb_norm, untilize cb_norm

cb_summary: cb_in:Wt/Wt cb_tilized:Wt/Wt cb_scaler:persist cb_mean:1/1 cb_centered:Wt/Wt cb_sq:Wt/Wt cb_var:1/1 cb_eps:persist cb_inv_std:1/1 cb_norm:Wt/Wt cb_out:Wt/Wt

description: Full layer norm with gamma/beta affine transform - modify reader for gamma/beta loading, compute for tilize(gamma/beta) + mul(gamma) + add(beta)

approach: Added gamma/beta tilize before main loop, added constexpr-if affine phases: mul(NONE,WaitAndPopPerTile,WaitUpfrontNoPop) for gamma, add(NONE,WaitAndPopPerTile,WaitUpfrontNoPop) for beta, reuse cb_tilized(24) and cb_centered(26) as affine temp CBs

cb_summary: phases1-7 same as normalize. cb_gamma_rm:Wt/Wt(tilize once) cb_gamma:Wt/persist cb_beta_rm:Wt/Wt(tilize once) cb_beta:Wt/persist cb_norm:Wt/Wt cb_tilized(24 reuse):Wt/Wt cb_centered(26 reuse):Wt/Wt cb_out:Wt/Wt

approach: TensorAccessor for RM sticks, push Wt pages per block
TensorAccessor for RM stick writes, 32 sticks per tile-row

change: fixed float conversion from reinterpret_cast to union
changed absent tensor placeholders from [0] to [0,0] and scaler from packed_bf16 to raw float32 bits
reason: TensorAccessorArgs reads 2 CT args for interleaved; prepare_reduce_scaler expects float

description: compute mean via reduce_row, subtract from tilized input

approach: added reduce SUM REDUCE_ROW WaitUpfrontNoPop for mean, sub COL NoWaitPopAtEnd+WaitAndPopPerTile for centering

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c8:1/persist c9:1/persist c16:Wt/Wt c24:Wt/Wt c25:1/1 c26:Wt/Wt

approach: added square WaitUpfrontNoPop, reduce SUM for var, add SCALAR+rsqrt post_reduce_op for inv_std, mul COL for normalize

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c8:1/persist c9:1/persist c16:Wt/Wt c24:Wt/Wt c25:1/1 c26:Wt/Wt c27:Wt/Wt c28:1/1 c29:1/1 c30:Wt/Wt

approach: added gamma/beta tilize before loop, constexpr-if 4 affine branches (both/gamma/beta/none), reuse freed CBs cb_tilized as cb_after_gamma and cb_centered as cb_after_beta

cb_summary: c0:Wt/Wt c1:Wt/persist c2:Wt/persist c3:Wt/Wt c4:Wt/Wt c8:1/persist c9:1/persist c16:Wt/Wt c24:reused c25:1/1 c26:reused c27:Wt/Wt c28:1/1 c29:1/1 c30:Wt/Wt
